name: Ketamine
summary: Ketamine entry from SciSpace evidence pass. Evidence level: high clinical-specific.
description: Ketamine is cataloged as arylcyclohexylamine dissociative anesthetic. Reported mechanisms: NMDA receptor antagonism; glutamate/AMPA activation; BDNF/mTOR synaptogenesis pathways.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
